purpose: Priority ETF target universe for holdings extraction/refresh workflows.
notes: This file is the actionable ETF holdings target list derived from the broader ETF context universe.
trading-data should prioritize durable holdings coverage for this list before expanding wider.
trading-model may still score/prune final usefulness downstream.
Redundant broad-market duplicates (`VOO`, `IVV`, `VTI`) and redundant gold duplicate (`IAU`) were removed from the active holdings target list.
Independent crypto proxy ETFs and relatively independent industry/thematic ETFs remain prioritized.
